description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden bookcase with a warm brown finish, featuring three open shelves and two lower drawers with metallic handles. The top two shelves are filled with a variety of books, some stacked vertically and others leaning, while the bottom shelf is partially filled. The lower section consists of two drawers and a cabinet with double doors, providing additional storage space. The bookcase stands on four slender legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, and the overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted. The design is simple yet elegant, suitable for both residential and urban public spaces such as libraries or community centers.
description: A tall, brown wooden bookcase with three shelves, two drawers, and a lower cabinet, partially filled with books. It features metallic handles and stands on four slender legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three shelves with books, two drawers, and a lower cabinet with double doors.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and depth of the bookcase, with no visible shelves or books.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat wooden back panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and solid wood construction.
